description: Mastra agents registered by tools/learning-loop-mastra/mastra/server.js. Per-agent `model` field overrides MASTRA_AGENT_MODEL and the code default.

intake_agent.name: intakeAgent
intake_agent.description: Orient operator into current meta-state; produce ordered deterministic verification plan

scout_agent.name: scoutAgent
scout_agent.description: Wrap the pure-function scout pipeline; surface structured readiness report

self_improvement_agent.name: selfImprovementAgent
self_improvement_agent.description: Turn gaps surfaced by scout into experiment candidates; write to meta-surface registry
